description: Trigger accuracy queries for the dataviz skill description. ~20 queries split into should-trigger and should-not-trigger sets. Each query should be run 3 times; trigger rate >0.5 = pass for should-trigger, <0.5 = pass for should-not-trigger.

should_trigger.query: I have a CSV of monthly sales by region, can you make a chart?
Here's my data file — I want to visualize it for my manager
can u make a dashboard from this parquet file lol
I want to show trends in our quarterly revenue over the last 3 years
Help me compare these categories side by side
My boss wants me to make this data presentable for a board meeting
I have a JSON file and I want to understand it visually
What chart type should I use to compare 12 countries by GDP per capita?
Build me a Vite app that plots this Excel spreadsheet
I need to tell a story with data about our user growth

should_not_trigger.query: Fix the colors in my CSS stylesheet
Analyze this CSV with pandas and show me the mean and std
should_not_trigger.note: near-miss: CSV + analysis but no visualization output

should_not_trigger.query: Update the Excel formulas in column D
should_not_trigger.note: near-miss: Excel but spreadsheet editing, not visualization

should_not_trigger.query: Write a Python script to clean and deduplicate this dataset
should_not_trigger.note: near-miss: data + Python but no chart

should_not_trigger.query: How do I connect to my PostgreSQL database from Python?
Generate a Figma mockup of our new landing page
should_not_trigger.note: design tool but static infographic, not data chart

should_not_trigger.query: My bar chart code is throwing a TypeError on line 42, can you fix it?
should_not_trigger.note: near-miss: bar chart but it's a code debugging task, not visualization lifecycle

should_not_trigger.query: I just want a quick SQL query to group sales by region
should_not_trigger.note: near-miss: data analysis but no visualization output

should_not_trigger.query: Can you review my D3.js code for performance issues?
should_not_trigger.note: near-miss: charting library but code review, not visualization design

should_not_trigger.query: What are the best color palettes for a mobile app UI?
should_not_trigger.note: near-miss: colors/palettes but UI design, not data visualization
